    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BulkDeleteMonitorNoDestAction
    Bulk-deletes all Web Users that are classified as Monitor users but have no destination category assigned (i.e. their categories are exclusively from the monitor set with no * operations category).
